args: Use plugin tools to publish a text message to RabbitMQ queue 'openai_test_queue'. Required target is plugins.integrations.pika_plugin::PikaPlugin.publish_message. Use constructor_args: {"host":"localhost","port":5672,"virtual_host":"/","username":"guest","password":"guest"}. Use args: [{"queue_name":"openai_test_queue","message":"openai test message","durable":true,"persistent":true}]. After tool execution, return a short confirmation with queue name and status.
